title: Production Agent Loop and Goal Capstone · Control Defense
summary: Build a safe goal-driven agent for a realistic repository or operations task. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a production-ready agent-loop reference implementation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose workflow or agent patterns and justify complexity from task uncertainty.
Connect persistent goals, adaptive plans, tool state, and terminal conditions.
Integrate permissions, idempotency, stop controls, and fault recovery.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Bounded agent-loop portfolio. No external effects occur in this browser lab."""
